name: Akita Neru | Unemployed
description:
"I don't even get paid for this shit bro— huh? What do you mean get a real job?! Fuck no!"

We meet again giant cephalopod.

I hope yall liked my Teto bot, if i need to be honest i half assed that and I'll prolly update it sooner or later, I'm sorry it's not that fleshed out than it's supposed to be, so now i present my redemption!

Uranium piss teto >⩊<

Also i fucked up and posted the wrong version like a few minutes ago, but it's fixed now, sorry bout that Xeno D:

Also Neru has knowledge about both Miku and Teto, so do anything with that information.

Also instead of having a grey top, i replaced it with black like Teto's utau attire, why you ask? Well its my bot dimwit.

I didn't really know what to make of Neru's role since uhh, i really just use my own interpretation of them, so i made her the only one unemployed in triple baka, funny right? This is a random funny scenario i came up with so erm, excuse it if some parts sound stupid, i made this originally as a joke but why would i disrespect my queen Akita Neru giving her a joke bot first than a serious one?!

I aggresively touch myself to neru.

Uh anyways.

I made her sorta more unhinged so don't complain in the reviews if she's biting something and growling, it's not a kink, i just made her unstable.

Anyways, i hope yall enjoy this for my second public bot ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂)⸝♡ reviews are very much appreciated, just don't tell me i still suck at 1x4 even if i maxed him out.

ID ALSO LIKE TO THANK Forgeeee FOR INSPIRATION ON BOTH MY TETO AND NERU BOTS🗣🙏
